text:
is a member of the Military Police Regiment in the web series Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi. He is portrayed by .

Appearance

Izuru is a man of medium build with dark hair combed to the left side of his head. He wears the Military Police Regiment uniform.

Personality

Story

Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi

Trivia

Izuru functions as a replacement for Moblit Berner, serving a similar role as Hange's unwilling assistant in their experiments.
